name: lynkspot.com
message: Lynk,® was founded in 1979, and for the past 35 years we have been dedicated to developing innovative and creative products that make organizing your home easy. A pioneer in the consumer storage category, our intelligent designs have been awarded over 80 United States patents. We focus on the details and believe that quality matters. At Lynk,® we work hard to help you organize your life. Employees: 25 Revenue:$5 Million Industry:Manufacturing Phone Number:(913) 492-1852
